The Copyright Act, 1957 प्रतिलिप्‍यधिकार अधिनियम, 1957
Act ID: 195714
Act Number: 14
Enactment Date: 1957-06-04
Act Year: 1957
Short Title: The Copyright Act, 1957
Hindi Title: प्रतिलिप्‍यधिकार अधिनियम, 1957
Long Title: An Act to amend and consolidate the law relating to copyright.
Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Interpretation.
